features: Dove Men+Care Advanced Extra Fresh Anti-Perspirant Roll On Deodorant provides the performance you need and superior comfort for your underarm skin – tough on sweat, not on skin
This deodorant for men offers up to 72 hours of sweat and odour protection
The improved formula of our antiperspirant features Triple Action technology which gives you advanced, complete protection throughout the day
This antiperspirant deodorant contains ¼ moisturising cream to protect your skin from irritation
Dove Men+Care Advanced Extra Fresh deodorant roll on has a long-lasting citrus scent that will keep you feeling fresh all day
Globally, Dove deodorant is not tested on animals, with our products being certified as cruelty-free and PETA approved vegan.
description: Product Description If you’re after a long-lasting deodorant for men that works as long and hard as you, try Dove Men+Care Advanced Extra Fresh Anti-Perspirant Roll On Deodorant. Engineered specifically for men, this antiperspirant roll on now features Triple Action technology to deliver 72 hours of powerful odour and sweat protection, helping you stay fresh and dry no matter what comes your way. Its non-irritant formula contains ¼ moisturising cream to strengthen your skin against underarm rash and chafing, keeping your underarms comfortable all day. How to use: Before applying, ensure underarms are dry. Roll on in circular motions, checking coverage is even on both underarms. Avoid contact with eyes and broken skin. Because Dove Men+Care celebrates a new definition of male strength — one with care at its centre — this roll on deodorant is tough on sweat, not on skin, and leaves an energising citrus scent that will keep you feeling fresh for longer. With better protection and care, you’ll get the increased confidence you need to be your best all day. Why not try it alongside our Dove Men+Care Body and Face Wash for lasting comfort and freshness? Dove Men+Care Advanced Extra Fresh antiperspirant also comes in 150/200 ml spray cans, as well as in a deodorant stick that’s perfect for your gym bag or luggage for when you are on the go. Ingredients Aqua, Aluminum Sesquichlorohydrate, Glycerin, Helianthus Annuus Seed Oil, Steareth-2, Parfum, Calcium Chloride, Glycine, Steareth-20, Disodium EDTA, Pentaerythrityl Tetra-di-t-butyl Hydroxyhydrocinnamate, Citronellol, Hexyl Cinnamal, Limonene, Linalool. Directions Apply under armpits Manufacturer Contact Information Unilever Dept ER, Wirral CH63 3JW UK See more
